conflicts.rationale: combined_ccn_campus_treatment_unresolved,current_roster_membership_unresolved,highest_ownership_boundary_unreviewed,payer_setting_scope_undefined,rehabilitation_inclusion_unreviewed,shared_ccn_treatment_unreviewed,source_vintage_2023,technical_definition_not_receipted,utilization_denominator_undefined,west_grove_post_vintage_membership: The exact 2023 sys_dsch candidate is source-local to HSI00000218 and two linkage rows; it does not establish the current four-facility roster, treatment of the combined 080001 CCN/campuses, or post-vintage West Grove membership.

current_roster_membership_unresolved,frozen_33_facility_boundary_mismatch,highest_ownership_boundary_unreviewed,lvhn_post_vintage_membership,payer_setting_scope_undefined,rehabilitation_inclusion_unreviewed,shared_ccn_treatment_unreviewed,source_vintage_2023,technical_definition_not_receipted,utilization_denominator_undefined: The exact 2023 sys_dsch candidate is source-local to nine linkage rows (seven acute); it predates the frozen 33-facility boundary and later LVHN membership, and its rehabilitation and shared-CCN treatment are not definitionally receipted.

admissions_discharges_context_unreconciled,current_roster_membership_unresolved,highest_ownership_boundary_unreviewed,jeanes_blank_linkage_value,payer_setting_scope_undefined,rehabilitation_inclusion_unreviewed,shared_ccn_treatment_unreviewed,source_vintage_2023,technical_definition_not_receipted,utilization_denominator_undefined: The exact 2023 sys_dsch candidate is source-local to four linkage rows; Jeanes is acute with a blank hos_dsch and Fox Chase is non-acute with a value, so the utilization boundary cannot be reconciled to other admissions/discharges contexts without a technical definition.

current_roster_membership_unresolved,highest_ownership_boundary_unreviewed,payer_setting_scope_undefined,post_vintage_membership_drift,rehabilitation_behavioral_scope_unresolved,rehabilitation_inclusion_unreviewed,shared_ccn_treatment_unreviewed,source_vintage_2023,technical_definition_not_receipted,utilization_denominator_undefined: The exact 2023 sys_dsch candidate is source-local to nine linkage rows; non-acute rehabilitation/behavioral rows, unresolved current facilities, and post-vintage membership make the current product boundary incomparable.

cape_regional_post_vintage_membership,childrens_boundary_unresolved,current_roster_membership_unresolved,highest_ownership_boundary_unreviewed,payer_setting_scope_undefined,rehabilitation_inclusion_unreviewed,shared_ccn_treatment_unreviewed,source_vintage_2023,technical_definition_not_receipted,utilization_denominator_undefined: The exact 2023 sys_dsch candidate is source-local to Camden's single linkage row; it predates the frozen Cape Regional inclusion and unresolved Children's boundary.

bryn_mawr_rehabilitation_scope_unresolved,current_roster_membership_unresolved,highest_ownership_boundary_unreviewed,payer_setting_scope_undefined,rehabilitation_inclusion_unreviewed,rehabilitation_roster_inclusion_mismatch,shared_ccn_treatment_unreviewed,source_vintage_2023,technical_definition_not_receipted,utilization_denominator_undefined: The exact 2023 sys_dsch candidate is source-local to five linkage rows, including a non-acute Bryn Mawr Rehabilitation row with hos_dsch 2067; without the technical definition, rehabilitation inclusion cannot be inferred or approved.

coverage.reason: The exact 2023 sys_dsch candidate is source-local to HSI00000218 and two linkage rows; it does not establish the current four-facility roster, treatment of the combined 080001 CCN/campuses, or post-vintage West Grove membership.

The exact 2023 sys_dsch candidate is source-local to nine linkage rows (seven acute); it predates the frozen 33-facility boundary and later LVHN membership, and its rehabilitation and shared-CCN treatment are not definitionally receipted.

The exact 2023 sys_dsch candidate is source-local to four linkage rows; Jeanes is acute with a blank hos_dsch and Fox Chase is non-acute with a value, so the utilization boundary cannot be reconciled to other admissions/discharges contexts without a technical definition.

The exact 2023 sys_dsch candidate is source-local to nine linkage rows; non-acute rehabilitation/behavioral rows, unresolved current facilities, and post-vintage membership make the current product boundary incomparable.
The exact 2023 sys_dsch candidate is source-local to Camden's single linkage row; it predates the frozen Cape Regional inclusion and unresolved Children's boundary.

The exact 2023 sys_dsch candidate is source-local to five linkage rows, including a non-acute Bryn Mawr Rehabilitation row with hos_dsch 2067; without the technical definition, rehabilitation inclusion cannot be inferred or approved.
